violations.text: Bread Crumbs were observed stored on the floor in the food storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/11/2026
The lids on the Pizza Prep Unit was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the walk in cooler, two door low boy and two door freezer. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the prep unit doors. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2025
The storage shelf in the walk in cooler was observed in poor condition. Equipment must be maintained. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the of shelfing and areas around the fryolator have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non Food contact surfaces must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025

Tile coving was observed in poor repair by the freezers. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Grout was observed in poor repair under the three bay. Grout must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2025
The floors were observed with an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/18/2025
The hood system was observed with an excess of debris. Hood systems must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of staff, recently prepared chicken fingers were placed in the prep unit low boy to cool. Inspector asked that staff cool chicken fingers in walk-in cooler. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/14/2023
Working tray of dough was observed stored on top of a trash can in the kitchen. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/14/2023
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. Per interview of PIC, gaskets are on order. This violation has not exceeded the original correct by date. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the walls and ventilation near the pizza oven have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (tomato slicer and pepper slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023

Deli-cheeses located in the preparation unit were observed marked with a date that exceeded the 7 days limit for ready to eat foods. Food items were observed dated 11/25/23. Food items was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023

Quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution was stored in a bucket at 0 parts per million (ppm). A quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023

Working containers of sugar and salt was not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023
Refrigerator door gaskets at the 1 door freezer and pizza prep-units was observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2023

The following equipment throughout the establishment were observed with an accumulation debris, dust, or dried grease. 1) Inside of prep unit. 2) Under equipment and prep-tables. 3) Outer areas of reach in freezer in front cook line (dried grease/oil/other debris). 4) Ventilation covers near pizza oven (dust). 5) Fans and shelving at the walk-in cooler. 6) Mop sink area. All areas MUST be cleaned and kept free of grease, dust and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023

The floors in the walk-in cooler, storage room, and next to oven unit, had accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2023
The ventilation hood system has an accumulation of grease, must be thoroughly cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2023
